day1_baseline.description: Baseline — original LLMAgent, no sequencing guidance (instructor-provided)
day1_baseline.source: instructor-provided; git commit d11a97072c49d093f7b5a3e4fe9da95b490d43ba; 150 sims, 5 trials x 30 tasks

V3.description: Execute-first — fixes confirmation anti-pattern; execute on approval, verify internally

ablation_dev.best_variant_rationale: Higher mean pass@1 (0.5789 vs 0.5263) on dev; selected for held-out

your_method.description: Plan-Execute-Verify agent — verify-only instruction, best dev ablation variant
your_method.note: Delta A negative. 7/20 INFRASTRUCTURE_ERROR. CI [0.23, 0.77] overlaps baseline CI [0.65, 0.79]. No statistically significant improvement. See method.md §9 for root cause and diagnosis.

automated_optimization.note: Not run. PEV is a hand-designed single-shot mechanism. Expected Delta B negative: automated search at equivalent $4 compute budget would likely outperform hand-crafted variants through iterative search over ~50-100 candidates. Compute was consumed by V1/V2/V3 variants. See method.md §8.

_meta.delta_a_summary: Method (V1) pass@1=0.4615 vs baseline 0.7267 = -0.2652 (negative; CI overlap; mechanism did not beat baseline)
_meta.prompt_length_confound: V0~60tok, V1~100tok, V2~210tok, V3~95tok. Not length-controlled. See method.md §4.2.
_meta.honest_assessment: The PEV mechanism failed to improve on the baseline. Root cause: qwen3 thinking model already applies internal CoT. Infrastructure errors (35-85% failure rates) made evaluation unreliable. V3 could not be validated due to API credit exhaustion.
